case_title: VALERY SPEKTOR VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (CCSF)

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-16-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-16-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY THERESA LACSON-KUAN -- INVESTIGATOR. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER---TATIANA ALCONA.. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY SPEKTOR, VALERY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (CCSF) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (CCSF)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPEKTOR, VALERY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPEKTOR, VALERY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (CCSF) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
